PROP-01b-partial3-inv-045.text: AssetOut (LINK) is never auctioned — transferred directly to assetOutReceiver in performUpkeep.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-045.assertion: forall performUpkeep(asset): asset == assetOut => transfer(receiver, all) and skip auction start

locations.note: lines 350-352: asset == s_assetOut => safeTransfer(s_assetOutReceiver, full balance) then continue (skip _onAuctionStart)
